# [Process Doc Update]: Create README for OctoAcme Project Management Docs with links to all docs and project management processes summary

## Which process document do you want to update?
<new document>

## Summary of New Content
Create a comprehensive README for the OctoAcme Project Management Docs folder that:
1. Contains an overview and summary of OctoAcme's project management processes
2. Provides links to all process documentation files in the docs folder
3. Serves as a central navigation point for the project management documentation

## Why is this update needed?
The docs folder currently lacks a central index or README file. This makes it difficult for users to understand what documentation is available and how the various process documents relate to each other. A README with links and a process summary will improve discoverability and provide context for all project management documentation.

## Suggested Content
- **Overview**: Brief summary of OctoAcme's project management approach and lifecycle
- **Documentation Links**: Table of contents with links to:
  - [octoacme-project-management-overview.md](docs/octoacme-project-management-overview.md)
  - [octoacme-project-initiation.md](docs/octoacme-project-initiation.md)
  - [octoacme-project-planning.md](docs/octoacme-project-planning.md)
  - [octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md](docs/octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md)
  - [octoacme-risks-and-communication.md](docs/octoacme-risks-and-communication.md)
  - [octoacme-release-and-deployment.md](docs/octoacme-release-and-deployment.md)
  - [octoacme-retrospective-and-continuous-improvement.md](docs/octoacme-retrospective-and-continuous-improvement.md)
  - [octoacme-roles-and-personas.md](docs/octoacme-roles-and-personas.md)

## Acceptance Criteria
- ✅ Content aligns with existing process docs
- ✅ Update improves clarity or closes a documented gap
- ✅ Proposed content has been reviewed with stakeholders (if needed)
